body_excerpt: {"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9083", "cvss": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-22"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Description\r\nA flaw was found in Keycloak. A realm administrator with the \"manage-realm\" role can exploit this vulnerability by submitting an arbitrary filesystem path as a keystore parameter when creating a key provider component. This allows the administrator to probe arbitrary filesystem paths, determining which files exist and are readable by the Keycloak process. This information disclosure could be used to identify high-value targets for follow-on attacks.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9jrw-8xf7-xqhq", "html_url": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/security/advisories/GHSA-9jrw-8xf7-xqhq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9jrw-8xf7-xqhq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9083"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T22:51:48Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/546680?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pskopek", "id": 546680, "login": "pskopek", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU0NjY4MA==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Information disclosure through arbitrary filesystem path probing", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T22:51:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/keycloak/keycloak/security-advisories/GHSA-9jrw-8xf7-xqhq", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "", "name": ""}, "patched_versions": "26.6.4", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
